creator: jhibbits@FreeBSD.org
text: It might only occur on non-x86 platforms.  I know it occurs on powerpc64 with uboot.  It might occur on an ARM platform with a PCIe graphics card (highly unlikely that would ever happen).  But, the direct use of the RLEs is incorrect, and the public API should be used instead anyway.  So much of the work can be done and tested on x86.
